overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world video game (GTA San Andreas style) depicting a character walking along a Las Vegas-style casino strip, stopping to observe traffic at an intersection, crossing the busy street, and approaching a pirate ship attraction named 'Pirates in Men's Pants'.

woman in dark dress walking alongside

large commercial building with casino signage and tiled walkway
traffic signal suspended over the intersection ahead
wide concrete pedestrian walkway with patterned tiles

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunny casino strip sidewalk lined with palm trees, following other pedestrians toward an intersection. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches the corner and slows to a stop.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with casino parking entrance and billboard

events.description: traffic light changes and vehicles begin moving through the intersection
pedestrians begin crossing the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: standing at the corner observing traffic and waiting while pedestrians cross the street

group of pedestrians crossing the street in front of the character

entered.detail: large vertical billboard advertising free margaritas and food specials
red sedan parked near the casino entrance

segments.scene_description: The character waits at a busy intersection as traffic flows through and pedestrians cross the street. A large billboard advertising free margaritas dominates the view across the street, while palm trees frame the scene.

character weaves between moving vehicles including a yellow taxi

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy multi-lane road, navigating between moving cars, then continuing along the street edge toward the pirate ship

blue sedan driving along the road parallel to the character

highway direction signs suspended over the road
tall hotel building with distinctive dome structure

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the busy street, weaving between moving traffic including a yellow taxi, then walks along the road edge toward a large pirate ship attraction visible ahead. The scene opens up to show more of the casino strip and overhead road signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: pirate ship themed attraction entrance with wooden walkways

character ascends wooden stairs leading up into the ship structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the pirate ship attraction and ascending the wooden stairs into the structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking ahead toward the ship entrance

entered.detail: large black sign with white text reading PIRATES IN MEN'S PANTS
white wooden staircase leading up into the pirate ship
tall wooden masts with rigging and crow's nests against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the pirate ship attraction, passing under the 'Pirates in Men's Pants' sign and walking through sandy themed landscaping. The character then ascends wooden stairs into the ship structure, with the camera following from behind as the rigging and masts fill the frame against the bright sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny casino strip that transitions from a crowded pedestrian sidewalk to the interior of a themed pirate attraction. It begins by following a character from behind as they walk past palm trees toward a busy intersection, where the camera slows to a stop amidst flowing traffic and a large margarita billboard. As the character begins to cross the street, the view expands to reveal overhead road signs and the broader cityscape while weaving past a yellow taxi. The scene then shifts toward a large pirate ship attraction, moving through sandy themed landscaping and under a sign for Pirates in Men's Pants. Finally, the camera follows the character up wooden stairs and into the ship structure, where rigging and masts fill the frame against the bright sun.
